context_only: # tp v0.28.0 — Reset-native workflow: resume oracle + hc commit delegation
## 3. Reset boundaries and the checkpoint invariant

tasks.title: Add commit_shas field with mirror
tasks.acceptance: Task gains commit_shas []string with omitempty. When commit_shas is non-empty, commit_sha equals commit_shas[0]. A pre-0.28.0 task with only commit_sha reads back unchanged.
tasks.closed_reason:
- commit_shas []string field added with omitempty (internal/model/task.go:34)
- SetCommitSHAs + UnmarshalJSON keep commit_sha = commit_shas[0] when non-empty (task.go)
- a pre-0.28.0 task with only commit_sha round-trips unchanged (omitempty, no forced commit_shas)

tasks.title: Add keep_uncommitted to local config
tasks.acceptance: LocalConfig gains keep_uncommitted []KeepEntry with path and reason fields. Absent keep_uncommitted marshals omitted. An explicit empty list marshals as [].
tasks.closed_reason:
- LocalConfig gained keep_uncommitted *[]KeepEntry and a KeepEntry{path,reason} type (internal/model/projectconfig.go)
- absent keep_uncommitted marshals omitted via nil pointer + omitempty
- an explicit non-nil empty slice marshals as [] (pointer-to-slice distinguishes absent from empty)

tasks.title: Resolve commit_strategy with hc detect
tasks.acceptance: Resolution returns builtin, auto, or hc by task-override over project over built-in precedence with auto as the default. auto resolves to hc when hc is on PATH else builtin. A present unrecognized value resolves to builtin and an absent value resolves to auto.
tasks.closed_reason:
- ResolveCommitStrategy resolves builtin/auto/hc by task-override>project>built-in with auto default (internal/engine/commitstrategy.go)
- EffectiveCommitStrategy maps auto to hc when hc on PATH else builtin (HasHC probes exec.LookPath)
- a present unrecognized value resolves to builtin with a warning; an absent value resolves to auto

tasks.title: Read write keep_uncommitted store
tasks.acceptance: keep_uncommitted is read and written in .tp/local.json under flock. Paths are normalized repo-root-relative before storage. Presence round-trips: absent stays absent and an explicit empty stays [].
tasks.closed_reason:
- keep_uncommitted is parsed in LoadLocalConfig and written by WriteLocalConfig; UpdateKeepList does a flock read-modify-write of .tp/local.json (internal/engine/projectconfig.go, keeplist.go)
- NormalizeKeepPath converts a path to clean repo-root-relative (git top-level base) before storage, prefixing a subdirectory
- presence round-trips: absent keep_uncommitted stays nil (omitted), an explicit empty stays [] via the *[]KeepEntry pointer

tasks.title: Match paths against keep list
tasks.acceptance: A path matches a keep_uncommitted entry by filepath.Match with the first matching entry winning and supplying reason. A path list classifies into kept as {path,reason} and changes as the unmatched paths. A malformed pattern is reported as ErrBadPattern.
tasks.closed_reason:
- MatchKeepList matches a path against entries by filepath.Match, first matching entry wins and supplies reason (internal/engine/keeplistmatch.go)
- ClassifyPaths splits a path list into kept {path,reason} and changes (unmatched paths)
- a malformed entry pattern surfaces as filepath.ErrBadPattern from MatchKeepList/ClassifyPaths

tasks.title: Parse git status porcelain output
tasks.acceptance: git status --porcelain=v1 -z -uall parses into repo-root-relative changed file paths. A staged rename yields the destination path and untracked files enumerate individually. A non-git directory yields an empty list.
tasks.closed_reason:
- WorktreeChanges runs git status --porcelain=v1 -z -uall at the repo root, yielding repo-root-relative paths (internal/engine/worktree.go)
- a staged rename yields only the destination path (origin NUL field consumed) and -uall enumerates untracked files individually
- a non-git directory (empty gitToplevel) yields an empty list

tasks.title: Detect lifecycle phase task first
tasks.acceptance: Phase detection returns implement, audit, release, decompose, or review by the task-first ordering. An open task yields implement even when the spec is stale. Zero tasks with a converged review yields decompose else review.
tasks.closed_reason:
- DetectPhase returns implement/audit/release/decompose/review by task-first ordering (internal/engine/phase.go)
- an open task (numDone<numTasks) yields implement regardless of staleness, which only affects blockers
- zero tasks with reviewConverged yields decompose, else review

tasks.title: Compute resume blockers with data
tasks.acceptance: Blockers are objects with code, class, message, and data emitted in a fixed code order. unexplained-changes is agent-clearable when changes is non-empty while no-ready-task and spec-stale are escalate. budget-exhausted is phase-gated and never fires when max_rounds is 0.
tasks.closed_reason:
- BuildBlockers emits {code,class,message,data} in the fixed §4.6 code order (internal/engine/resumeblockers.go)
- unexplained-changes is agent-clearable when changes is non-empty; no-ready-task and spec-stale are escalate
- review/audit-budget-exhausted are phase-gated and never fire when max_rounds is 0

tasks.title: Build per phase next action
tasks.acceptance: next_action carries command, summary, and payload per phase. review and audit payloads carry round as recorded rounds plus one and unresolved_findings as zero for the first round. implement previews {task,wip} and decompose and release commands are null.
tasks.closed_reason:
- BuildNextAction fills next_action.command/summary/payload per phase (internal/engine/resumepayload.go)
- review and audit payloads carry round=len(rounds)+1 and unresolved_findings (0 for the first round, else non-wontfix count of the previous round via roundPayload)
- implement previews {task:{id}|null, wip} via ImplementPreview (first wip file-order else priority-first ready); decompose and release have a null command and {} payload

tasks.title: Assemble resume result object
tasks.acceptance: The resume result is assembled as phase, spec, changes, kept, next_action, and blockers. changes and kept are byte-sorted. Assembly performs no write.
tasks.closed_reason:
- AssembleResume returns {phase, spec, changes, kept, next_action, blockers} from durable state (internal/engine/resume.go)
- changes are byte-sorted (sort.Strings) and kept byte-sorted by path (sort.Slice)
- assembly only reads (LoadReviewState/LoadKeepList/WorktreeChanges/SpecHash), performs no write

tasks.title: Add tp resume command
tasks.acceptance: tp resume resolves the task file with the spec argument winning and exits 3 when none is found. It emits the resume JSON when piped. --compact strips summary, kept reason, and blocker message while keeping data, and the command writes no file.
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp resume resolves the task file (spec argument winning via SpecAdjacentTaskFile, else discovery) and exits 3 when none is found (internal/cli/resume.go)
- it emits the resume JSON when piped (output.IsJSON) and a short human summary in a TTY, writing no file
- --compact strips next_action.summary, kept[].reason, and blockers[].message while keeping data (resumeJSON)

tasks.title: Add tp keep command
tasks.acceptance: tp keep <path> <reason> adds or updates an entry, --remove drops one with an absent path a no-op at exit 0, and --list prints [] when empty. A missing reason or a malformed glob exits 2. The path is stored repo-root-relative from any subdirectory.
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp keep <path> <reason> adds or updates an entry, --remove drops one (absent path a no-op at exit 0), and --list prints [] when empty (internal/cli/keep.go)
- a missing reason or a malformed glob (filepath.ErrBadPattern) exits 2
- the path is stored repo-root-relative from any subdirectory via NormalizeKeepPath (fixed to use the Go project root so it matches git status output)

tasks.title: Record commit_shas on done
tasks.acceptance: tp done --commit is repeatable and records commit_shas in order with a duplicate sha exiting 1. commit_sha mirrors commit_shas[0]. A --covered-by close records neither commit_shas nor commit_sha.
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp done --commit is now repeatable (StringArrayVar); records commit_shas in order via SetCommitSHAs, a duplicate sha exits 1 with 'duplicate commit sha' (internal/cli/done.go resolveCommitSHAs)
- commit_sha mirrors commit_shas[0] through model.SetCommitSHAs across single, multi, and batch closes
- a --covered-by close records neither commit_shas nor commit_sha (recording guarded by !isCoveredBy)

tasks.title: Gate commit commands under hc
tasks.acceptance: Under an effective hc strategy tp commit, tp done --auto-commit, and a bare tp done are rejected with exit 2 and the hc hint, and tp close follows the same rule. A batch row lacking both commit_shas and covered_by is a failed row. No commit path returns exit 4.
tasks.closed_reason:
- under effective hc, tp commit (commit.go), tp done --auto-commit and a bare tp done (done.go runDone), and tp close (close.go) are each rejected with exit 2 and the hc hint via resolveEffectiveStrategy (cli/commitstrategy.go)
- a batch row lacking both commit_shas and covered_by is a failed row under effective hc (done.go runDoneBatch per-row check)
- every rejection uses ExitUsage (2); no commit-strategy path returns exit 4

tasks.title: Report effective commit strategy
tasks.acceptance: Plain tp config adds a top-level commit_strategy_effective of builtin or hc after auto resolution. tp config --resolved keeps commit_strategy as {value,source}. An unrecognized value and an hc-absent hc strategy each print a one-line stderr warning.
tasks.closed_reason:
- plain tp config adds a top-level commit_strategy_effective of builtin or hc after auto resolution (internal/cli/config.go runConfig)
- tp config --resolved keeps commit_strategy as {value,source} with value the normalized name (resolvedConfig via engine.ResolveCommitStrategy)
- an unrecognized value and an hc-absent hc strategy each print a one-line stderr warning (warnCommitStrategy in cli/commitstrategy.go)

tasks.title: Guard commit_shas managed field
tasks.acceptance: tp reopen clears commit_shas alongside commit_sha, gate_passed_at, and gate_skipped_reason. tp set rejects commit_shas as a managed field with exit 2.
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp reopen now clears commit_shas alongside commit_sha, gate_passed_at, and gate_skipped_reason (internal/cli/reopen.go)
- tp set rejects commit_shas as a managed field with exit 2 (internal/cli/set.go managedFields map)

tasks.title: Warn on unexplained changes
tasks.acceptance: After a successful close tp done and tp close print a one-line stderr warning naming the unexplained-change count and exit 0. A keep-listed change produces no warning. tp neither commits nor discards the change.
source_sections: ## 8. Uncommitted changes are surfaced, never swept
tasks.closed_reason:
- after a successful close tp done and tp close print a one-line stderr warning naming the unexplained-change count and exit 0 (internal/cli/changewarn.go, done.go, close.go)
- a keep-listed change produces no warning (ClassifyPaths excludes kept files; the task file and its flock are also excluded)
- tp neither commits nor discards the change (WorktreeChanges only reads git status)

tasks.title: Test phase detection
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover implement even when stale and the audit, release, decompose, and review transitions from durable state.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestDetectPhase covers the implement/audit/release/decompose/review transitions by the task-first ordering (internal/engine/resumephase_test.go)
- TestAssembleResume_ImplementEvenWhenStale asserts an open task yields implement with a spec-stale blocker from durable review state
- TestAssembleResume audit/release/decompose/review cases assert each transition from recorded rounds with no in-memory context

tasks.title: Test discovery spec resolution
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover no task file with no argument exiting 3, the spec argument winning over a discovered spec, and an absent adjacent task file yielding decompose or review.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestResume_NoTaskFileNoArgExit3 asserts no task file with no argument exits 3 with 'no task file found' (internal/cli/resume_discovery_test.go)
- TestResume_SpecArgumentWinsOverDiscovered asserts the spec argument wins over a discovered task file's spec
- TestResume_AbsentAdjacentTaskFileYieldsReview asserts an absent adjacent task file yields review from empty task state

tasks.title: Test resume payload
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover the implement payload previewing first wip else first ready else null with a no-ready-task blocker, review and audit round and unresolved_findings with zero for the first round, and decompose and release null command.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestResume_ImplementPayload{PrefersWIP,FirstReady,NoReadyBlocker} cover previewing first wip else first ready else null with a no-ready-task blocker (internal/cli/resume_payload_test.go)
- TestResume_{Review,Audit}PayloadFirstRound assert round=1 and unresolved_findings=0 for the first round with the tp review/audit command literals
- TestResume_{Decompose,Release}PayloadNullCommand assert a {} payload and a null command

tasks.title: Test worktree classification
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover modified, staged, and untracked each in changes with the unexplained-changes count, a staged rename destination, tp keep moving a path to kept, a glob matching two files yielding two kept entries with the first reason, and a non-git directory yielding empty arrays.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestResume_ChangesModifiedStagedUntracked asserts modified, staged, and untracked files each land in changes with the unexplained-changes count (internal/cli/resume_worktree_test.go)
- TestResume_StagedRenameReportsDestination asserts a staged rename reports its destination; TestResume_KeepMovesChangeToKept asserts tp keep moves a path to kept
- TestResume_GlobMatchesTwoFiles asserts a glob yields two kept entries; TestResume_NonGitDirectoryEmptyArrays asserts a non-git directory yields empty arrays

tasks.title: Test blocker vocabulary
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover the blocker code, class, message, and data shapes, the agent-clearable and escalate classes, the fixed emission order, and budget-exhausted at the cap.
tasks.closed_reason:
- tests assert blocker code, class, message, and data shapes for unexplained-changes, no-ready-task, review-budget-exhausted, and spec-stale (internal/engine/resumeblockers_test.go)
- agent-clearable (unexplained-changes) and escalate (others) classes are covered, as is the fixed unexplained-changes->spec-stale emission order
- budget-exhausted fires at the cap and never fires when max_rounds is 0

tasks.title: Test tp keep command
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover add, overwrite, remove, and list with an empty [], a missing reason exiting 2, a malformed glob exiting 2, a subdirectory path stored repo-root-relative, and no entry written into a task file or .tp-review file.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestKeep_AddOverwriteRemoveList covers add, overwrite, remove, and --list printing [] when empty (internal/cli/keep_test.go)
- TestKeep_MissingReasonExit2 and TestKeep_MalformedGlobExit2 assert exit 2; TestKeep_RemoveAbsentIsNoOp asserts exit 0; TestKeep_SubdirStoredRepoRootRelative asserts a subdirectory path stores as sub/x.log
- TestKeep_WritesOnlyLocalConfig asserts no entry is written into the task file or a .tp-review file and .tp/local.json stays git-ignored

tasks.title: Test compact readonly mode
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover --compact stripping summary, kept reason, and blocker message while keeping data, and tp resume writing no file and emitting JSON when piped.

tasks.title: Test strategy resolution
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover the resolution precedence, the auto default, effective hc and builtin reporting, and a present unrecognized value resolving to builtin with a warning.
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestResolveCommitStrategy covers task>project>built-in precedence and the auto default; TestEffectiveCommitStrategy covers auto->hc/builtin and explicit hc (internal/engine/commitstrategy_test.go)
- TestConfigCommitStrategyEffective asserts commit_strategy_effective is hc (TP_HC=1) and builtin (TP_HC=0); TestConfigResolvedCommitStrategyDefault asserts {value:auto,source:default} (internal/cli/strategy_config_test.go)
- TestConfigUnrecognizedStrategyWarns asserts a present unrecognized value resolves to builtin with a stderr warning and exit 0

tasks.title: Test close under strategies
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover builtin committing, effective hc rejecting commit, auto-commit, and bare done with exit 2, commit and covered-by closing, a batch bad row exiting 2, and no exit 4 path.

tasks.title: Test commit_shas recording
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover recording two commits with the sha mirror, a single commit, a duplicate exiting 1, a covered-by recording none, set rejecting, reopen clearing, and builtin recording a single-element list.

tasks.title: Test done warning
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover an unexplained change making tp done exit 0 with the stderr count, the change staying unmodified, and a keep-listed change producing no warning.

tasks.title: Document v0.28.0 features
tasks.acceptance: SKILL.md, README.md, and REFERENCE.md document tp resume, tp keep, commit_strategy, and the reference driver. CLAUDE.md updates the self-development rule for the hc close flow. All new commands and flags are reflected.
